summary: A Go-based CLI tool that migrates Goss tests to a new schema, detects monorepo structures, and executes assertions with OpenTelemetry observability.
concerns: staged but uncommitted changes may cause context drift
heavy recent focus on OpenTelemetry might be adding premature complexity
monorepo detection logic could become fragile across diverse project structures
suggestions: commit the staged changes to maintain a clean working tree
validate otel trace correlation overhead in production-like scenarios
expand test coverage for the plugin system
